\tzpentry{ID3884}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3884 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{\mu\nu}^{\text{eff}} = \eta_{\mu\nu} + h_{\mu\nu}^{\text{rot}} + \mathcal{O}\left(\frac{v^4}{c^4}\right) \end{equation}
